title: Reply with exactly: explorer OK
summary_text: Current dirty set: `351` entries (`128` tracked, `223` untracked). 1) Generated/runtime artifacts (safe to clean, with low operator risk) - `.fugue/kernel-runtime-workspaces/` (runtime receipts/state snapshots) - `.fugue/kernel-state/**` (ledger/compact/bootstrap/receipts/auth-evidence/consensus/scheduler/status + claim dir) - `.fugue/kernel-workspaces/`, `.fugue/test-workspace-receipts/`, `.fugue/test-workspaces/`, `.fugue/social-contexts/` - `output/` - `supabase/.temp/` - cache/temp folders: `scripts/eval/__pycache__/`, `scripts/local/__pycache__/`, `scripts/local/integrations/__pycache__/` - temp image artifacts: `tmp-note-medical-ai-thumbnail-v2.png`, `tmp-note-medical-ai-thumbnail-v3.png` 2) Likely intentional source/docs (preserve) - `.github/workflows/*.yml` (workflow behavior changed) - `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, `CODEX.md`, `README.md` (operator guidance) - `.codex/prompts/*.md` - `docs/**` (including `docs/agents/*`, `docs/kernel/*`, `docs/drafts/*`) - `config/**` (integration/rules config updates) - `rules/**` - `scripts/lib`, `scripts/local`, `scripts/harness`, `scripts/eval`, `scripts/sim-orchestrator-switch.sh`, `scripts/sops/import-to-keychain.sh`, etc. (active code edits) - `tests/**` (test additions/updates) 3) Ambiguous (do not auto-clean without confirmation) - `scripts/*` new untracked runtime-related files not obviously generated, e.g. `scripts/kernel-scheduler.sh`, `scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-claim.sh`, `scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-run-driver.sh`, `scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-status-surface.sh`, backup snapshots like `scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh.bak-...`, `scripts/lib/kernel-codex-thread.sh.bak-...` - `scripts/local/integrations/*` and launcher binaries/scripts (`scripts/local/launchers/*`, `scripts/skills/sync-fugue-local-skills.sh`) added during toolchain work - `config/skills/fugue-repo-skills-baseline.tsv`, `config/integrations/contracts/*`, `secrets/fugue-secrets.enc.tmp`, `.project-os/`, `.share-backups/`, `assets/fonts/` - `docs` additions like `docs/drafts/*` and contract/design notes that may be intentional outputs High-risk paths to avoid auto-cleaning (treat as non-disposable): `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, `CODEX.md`, `README.md`, `.github/workflows/**`, all modified `scripts/**`, `tests/**`, `config/**`, `docs/**`, and `secrets/fugue-secrets.enc.tmp`.
